ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aptus Value Housing Finance India Limited has submitted its routine quarterly compliance certificate under SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, to the stock exchanges. The company's Registrar and Transfer Agent, KFin Technologies Limited, certified that all details regarding securities dematerialized and rematerialized during the period have been duly furnished. This filing signifies standard regulatory adherence concerning investor services and share management, indicating good corporate governance with no material adverse impacts or red flags identified.
